summary: Iteration 67 - Financial Dashboard Frontend & Backend Integration Testing COMPLETE. All tests PASSED. Frontend: FinancialDashboard.js at /super-admin/finance renders correctly with 5 stat cards (Ingresos brutos: 44.48€, Comision plataforma: 8.01€, Pagado a sellers: 36.47€, Consolidado USD: $48.04, Payouts pendientes: 0), BarChart for monthly revenue by region (US/EU/KR/Other), PieChart showing EU 100%, expandable ledger table with 3 entries, working filter dropdown, and Excel download. Backend: All 14 API tests passed including financial-ledger, excel-export, scheduled-payouts, process-influencer-payouts, and refund endpoints with proper role-based access control.

issues: Console warning about recharts width/height -1 on initial render - not affecting functionality but indicates chart container sizing needs improvement

critical_code_review_comments: FinancialDashboard.js correctly implements all required features: stat cards, charts, ledger table, filters, Excel download
All data-testid attributes properly added for testing
Recharts console warning (width/height -1) appears during initial render but charts render correctly after data loads
SuperAdminLayoutResponsive correctly includes Contabilidad nav item with Wallet icon
App.js correctly routes /super-admin/finance to FinancialDashboard component
API integration uses correct endpoints with proper auth headers (withCredentials: true)
Excel download uses blob responseType and creates temporary download link correctly
Regional breakdown correctly identifies EU countries (ES, FR, DE, etc.), US, KR
Due payouts alert conditionally renders when there are overdue scheduled payouts
seed_data_creation: None - used existing ledger entries (3 entries: order_paid, seller_transfer, refund)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 verified FinancialDashboard frontend at /super-admin/finance. Key UI elements: 1) 5 stat cards with data-testid (stat-gross, stat-platform-fee, stat-seller-net, stat-usd, stat-payouts). 2) BarChart shows monthly revenue by region (US blue, EU green, KR amber, Other gray). 3) PieChart shows distribution (currently EU 100% since all test orders from Spain). 4) Ledger table with expandable rows (data-testid ledger-row-*), filter dropdown (data-testid ledger-filter), columns: Fecha, Evento, Order, Importe, Impuesto, USD, Pais. 5) Download Excel button works (creates .xlsx file). 6) Contabilidad nav item visible in sidebar. Note: recharts console warning about width/height -1 appears during initial render but doesn't affect functionality.
mocked_api_notes: No mocked APIs - all features use real backend implementation
